text:
Washer M5, 19.8 mm diameter, 1.65 mm thick.
Washer M5, 18.16 mm diameter, 1.65 mm thick.
Bolt M5*16 with "8" on the head.
Genuine HONDA Hex bolt M6 * 12.
Genuine HONDA Hex bolt M6 * 16.
Genuine HONDA Hex bolt M6 * 25.
Genuine HONDA Hex bolt M6 * 28.
Genuine HONDA Hex bolt M6 * 32.
Genuine HONDA Hex bolt M6 * 45.
Genuine HONDA Hex bolt M6 * 50.
Genuine HONDA Hex bolt M6 * 80.
This bolt has the "8"-mark on it's head.

no body gonna 'member you.
why you spend yo time doin this?
better elst to do with yo self?
jes keep on writin' there!
no one gonna 'member you!
why you write so many of dem words?
why do you care 'bout all those words anyways?
here for a moment even if no one listens in."
"Words be my treasure, sir."
Most words make me smile."
I guess you think you is pretty smart.
Well you go on now an' keep writin'.
maybe some fool will notice y'all.
the Magi of All Men.
